name: RING ENERGY, INC.
summary: Ring Energy, Inc. is an independent oil and natural gas company focused on the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of oil and natural gas properties. The company operates in the Permian Basin and other domestic onshore areas, producing oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids (NGLs) primarily through horizontal drilling and hydraulic fracturing techniques.
